_comment: Publish boundary for thinkwithv-skills. Only skills listed here ship. 'source: vault' skills are synced from the private vault's <name>/ directory by scripts/sync-from-vault.sh (the vault is directory-per-skill); 'source: repo' skills are canonical in this repo.

skills.name: i-have-adhd
skills.note: third-party: ported from ayghri/i-have-adhd (MIT). LICENSE travels with the skill dir.

skills.name: chat-synopsis
skills.note: multi-file (SKILL.md + commands + references) — canonical here; the vault holds only the single-file version
